title: Aether bedrock mobs
description: This modification brings content from the addon of the same name for bedrock to the original aether
body:
# Aether bedrock mobs
  This modification brings content from the addon of the same name for bedrock to the original Aether. This addition is necessary for those who are tired of the usual Aether and are looking forward to new adventures. To download you need geckolib and the original Aether. New entities and structures will not spawn in biomes added by other addons.

# New dungeons
  This modification adds new dungeons to the world of aether.
  
  Crystalite dungeon:
![Crystalite dungeon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6NmqryJl/images/82d246f44dc47b158e798458b15582901ce01a28.png)
  Labyrinth:
![Labyrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6NmqryJl/images/74c290552297fd915fe262849ac494393ad48539.png)
  Spirit dungeon:
![spirit dungeon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6NmqryJl/images/9952228e6b1dd1486f7158521c470c9160b47e78.png)
  Salt dungeon:
![salt dungeon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6NmqryJl/images/43de1843b44344d1a9b8f1b1d5fbd6981c2a3c93.png)
  Elder dungeon:
![Elder dungeon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6NmqryJl/images/961554e6550b4f701ba1dbc0a1da40eb09706740.png)
In data structures you can name new bosses, their henchmen and get new, unique weapons.
# New bosses
  Crystalite golem, enemy with powerful blows and a large number of assistants. Can only be summoned at night.
![Crystalite golem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6NmqryJl/images/dd970fa2c259615985ae7738176ea83f5800b81e.png)
  Aether Naga, a huge worm with fast attacks. Can only be summoned at night.
![Aether Naga](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6NmqryJl/images/0fda0a122e82f7bf23c1b3ec553e27eafc38f103.png)
  Spirit, is an equal opponent to you, can be summoned at any time.
![spirit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6NmqryJl/images/7832d70d5b6c0e52502d04da19a62d0d3e9942d4.png)
  Salt crab king, slow but with strong hits, can be summoned at any time.
![salt crab king](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6NmqryJl/images/5eac7eed29990612cbaf144bb1058ec3fc93da08.png)
# New mobs
  The fashion has a large number of new ambient mobs living in this dimension.
![new mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6NmqryJl/images/48a151f9589896a11dd1feaed0245820c99bb686.png)
# Next updates
  In the future it is planned to add a large number of new structures and bosses.
